NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS YANNICK WYN-LEMMA and WYN TUNNICLIFF's Motion To Consolidate Actions with 534645 For Trial is Granted. No opposition filed.
